speaker: [player]
text: What happens at the Full Convergence Event exactly?

speaker: Dirtus
text: We read all the poems together in sequence. Outdoors, at night, ideally on significant ground.

speaker: Dirtus
text: Scatha's. Which I interpret. But I'm open to input.

speaker: [player]
text: And the poems have to respond to each other?

speaker: Dirtus
text: They don't have to. But the best ritual texts do. It's called resonance structure. I found it in a book.

speaker: Dirtus
text: A poetry book. But I applied it to summoning theory.
